subcodes.first_line: We have risen this day amidst the effulgent rays of the Orb of God's bounty, the Lord of the worlds. All things have spoken forth from the heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصبحنا الیوم فی انوار نیر عنایه الله رب العالمین قد نطقت الاشیاء من ارتفاع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @goodly deeds; actions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
